subcodes.first_line: The letter which you had written to this servant, who standeth before the Throne, was mentioned in His presence, and signs of sorrow [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوبیکه بعبد حاضر لدی العرش نوشنه بودید تلقاء وجه مذکور شد و اثار حزن
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
